headline: Micron’s Path to $1,000 Per Share Runs Through the AI Memory Boom
summary: Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) has been one of the most explosive stories in semiconductors over the past year. Shares have surged 355% over the past twelve months, climbing from $101.39 to $461.73 as of March 18. Year-to-date, the stock is up 61.78%. headline: OpenAI’s 2026 Scorecard: A String of Lawsuits, Losses, and Broken Promises
summary: OpenAI entered 2026 confronting a pattern of broken commitments that had turned some of its closest allies into adversaries and cost the company $11.5 billion in 2025 last quarter. Amid the challenges it faces in 2026, co-founder Elon Musk is heading to trial on fraud charges, and Microsoft (MSFT), OpenAI’s largest shareholder, is reportedly considering legal action over an alleged breach of contract. headline: AI Is Running Out of Memory
summary: Editor’s Note: AI may look like a software story. But in reality, it depends on physical inputs – and those don’t always keep up with demand. One place this is already showing up is in memory. My colleague Eric Fry believes this could become one of the most important factors in the next phase of the AI boom. Without enough memory, AI systems simply can’t run at full capacity. And when that happens, it can change where money flows in the market.InvestorPlace - Stock Market News, Stock Advice & Tr

content.title: AI Is Running Out of Memory
content.summary: Editor’s Note: AI may look like a software story. But in reality, it depends on physical inputs – and those don’t always keep up with demand. One place this is already showing up is in memory. My colleague Eric Fry believes this could become one of the most important factors in the next phase of the AI boom. Without enough memory, AI systems simply can’t run at full capacity. And when that happens, it can change where money flows in the market.InvestorPlace - Stock Market News, Stock Advice & Tr

thumbnail.caption: An image of a signature that reads "Eric Fry" in black cursive font over a white background.
